assumption_bounded_upper_endpoint_densit.statement: Theorem 1(ii) and Lemma 1 use a bounded upper support endpoint, nonnegative value domain, and positive tail constants.

assumption_common_mean_argmax_domain.statement: The all-consumed endpoint chooses a type maximizing likelihood when conditional means are common and nonnegative.

assumption_decaying_bernoulli_parameter_.statement: Theorem 2 uses decaying Bernoulli success probabilities, with source alpha regimes and nondegenerate Bernoulli probability domains.

assumption_example1_positive_calibrated_.statement: Example 1 is a two-type probability model with an exponential conditional-value distribution.

assumption_exponential_order_statistic_d.statement: Theorem 1(iii) and Lemma D.3 use a positive-rate exponential distribution and positive top-k count.

assumption_finite_discrete_top_value_dom.statement: Theorem 1(i) and its proof use a finite discrete support with a top value and lower support values.

assumption_pareto_finite_mean_domain.statement: Theorem 1(iv) and Lemma D.4 use Pareto alpha > 1 and positive top-k count.

assumption_positive_rounding_population_.statement: Lemma D.5 and finite rounding statements are stated for positive population size.

assumption_positive_type_likelihoods.statement: The paper's finite-type model uses type preference probabilities p_t as likelihood weights and normalizes homogeneity targets by them.

assumption_proposition4_continuous_spher.statement: The folder currently stops Proposition 4 at an averaging/kernel checkpoint; the full continuous sphere, uniform measure, cosine-kernel/Fubini/symmetry, and Laplace-principle analytic instantiation remain partial.

assumption_uniform_top_k_positive_count_.statement: Proposition 2 is about positive top-k recommendation/consumption counts along a positive population sequence.

assumption_unique_common_mean_argmax_dom.statement: The converse endpoint uses the nondegenerate positive common mean and a unique likelihood maximizer.

assumption_varying_bernoulli_probability.statement: Theorem 3 and Corollary 3 use Bernoulli success probabilities in the nondegenerate probability range.

corollary1.statement: \forall {T : ℕ} [NeZero T] (likelihood : ItemType T \to ℝ) (gamma : ℝ), 0 \le gamma \to (\forall (t : ItemType T), 0 < likelihood t) \to \exists M, \forall (seq : OptimalAllocationSequence fun x  =>  M) (t : ItemType T), Tendsto (fun N  =>  (allocation N).representation t) atTop (nhds (likelihood t ^ gamma / \sum i, likelihood i ^ gamma))

corollary3.statement: \forall {T : ℕ} [NeZero T] (B : BernoulliSatisfactionModel T), (\forall (t : ItemType T), 0 < successProb t) \to (\forall (t : ItemType T), successProb t < 1) \to (\forall (t : ItemType T), 0 < likelihood t) \to (\forall (i j : ItemType T), successProb i = successProb j) \to AsymptoticHomogeneity (fun x  =>  toConsumptionModel) (uniformProfile T)

definition1.statement: \forall {T : ℕ} (a : CountAllocation T) (likelihood : ItemType T \to ℝ) (gamma : ℝ), \sum i, likelihood i ^ gamma \ne 0 \to ((gammaLikelihoodProfile likelihood gamma).Exact a \iff \forall (t : ItemType T), representation t = likelihood t ^ gamma / \sum i, likelihood i ^ gamma)

definition2.statement: \forall {T : ℕ} (seq : AllocationSequence T) (likelihood : ItemType T \to ℝ) (gamma : ℝ), \sum i, likelihood i ^ gamma \ne 0 \to (ConvergesToProfile (gammaLikelihoodProfile likelihood gamma) \iff \forall (t : ItemType T), Tendsto (fun N  =>  (allocation N).representation t) atTop (nhds (likelihood t ^ gamma / \sum i, likelihood i ^ gamma)))

definition3_expectedTopSum_formula.statement: \forall (T : ℕ) (mu : ℕ \to ℕ \to ℝ) (k : ℕ) (t : ItemType T) (a : ℕ), (definition3 T mu).expectedTopSum k t a = \sum i \in range (min k a), mu (a - i) a

example1.statement: \forall {p1 p2 lambda : ℝ}, 0 < p1 \to 0 < p2 \to 0 < lambda \to p1 + p2 = 1 \to \forall (seq : OptimalAllocationSequence fun x  =>  (exponentialTopOneHarmonicOracle 2 lambda).toConsumptionModel (example1GenreLikelihood p1 p2) 1), Tendsto (fun N  =>  (allocation N).representation 0) atTop (nhds p1) \land Tendsto (fun N  =>  (allocation N).representation 1) atTop (nhds p2)

lemma1_tail_formula.statement: \forall {beta c M L : ℝ} {k : ℕ} (baseMeasure : Measure ℝ) [IsProbabilityMeasure baseMeasure], (\forallᵐ (y : ℝ) ∂baseMeasure, L \le y \land y \le M) \to 0 < beta \to 0 < c \to (\forall {\epsilon : ℝ}, 0 < \epsilon \to \forallᶠ (x : ℝ) in nhdsWithin 0 (Ioi 0), (1 - \epsilon) * (c / beta) * x ^ beta \le real (Ici (M - x)) \land real (Ici (M - x)) \le (1 + \epsilon) * (c / beta) * x ^ beta) \to 0 < k \to 0 < M - L \to AsymptoticEquivalent (fun q  =>  orderStatisticTopKSumFromMean (expectedOrderStatisticMeanSeq fun a  =>  pi fun x  =>  baseMeasure) k (q + 1) - orderStatisticTopKSumFromMean (expectedOrderStatisticMeanSeq fun a  =>  pi fun x  =>  baseMeasure) k q) fun q  =>  (\sum p, boundedLemmaD2LimitCoeff beta c ↑snd) / beta * boundedPowerMarginalScale beta q

lemmaD1.statement: \forall {T : ℕ} {Mseq : ℕ \to ConsumptionModel T} {G : GammaHomogeneityProfile T} (seq : OptimalAllocationSequence Mseq) (finiteObj : ℕ \to CountAllocation T \to ℝ) (limitObj : (ItemType T \to ℝ) \to ℝ) (candidate : ℕ \to CountAllocation T), targetShare \in stdSimplex ℝ (ItemType T) \to ContinuousOn limitObj (stdSimplex ℝ (ItemType T)) \to (\forall x \in stdSimplex ℝ (ItemType T), x \ne targetShare \to limitObj x < limitObj targetShare) \to (\forallᶠ (N : ℕ) in atTop, \forall (b : CountAllocation T), FeasibleAtTotal N b \to finiteObj N b \le finiteObj N (allocation N)) \to (\forallᶠ (N : ℕ) in atTop, FeasibleAtTotal N (candidate N)) \to (\forall (\delta : ℝ), 0 < \delta \to \forallᶠ (N : ℕ) in atTop, limitObj targetShare - \delta \le finiteObj N (candidate N)) \to (\forall (\delta : ℝ), 0 < \delta \to \forallᶠ (N : ℕ) in atTop, \forall (a : CountAllocation T), FeasibleAtTotal N a \to finiteObj N a \le (limitObj fun t  =>  representation t) + \delta) \to ConvergesToProfile G

lemmaD2_formula.statement: \forall {beta c : ℝ} {k : ℕ} (G : ℝ \to ℝ) (C : BoundedLemmaD2SplitIntegralFiniteCertificate beta c k G), AsymptoticEquivalent (boundedLemmaD2TopKLoss k (boundedLemmaD2IndexedIntegralTerm G)) fun a  =>  (\sum p, boundedLemmaD2LimitCoeff beta c ↑snd) * boundedTailScale beta a

lemmaD3_formula.statement: \forall {T : ℕ} [NeZero T] (likelihood : ItemType T \to ℝ) (lambda : ℝ) (k : ℕ), 0 < lambda \to 0 < k \to (\forall (t : ItemType T), 0 < likelihood t) \to \forall (seq : OptimalAllocationSequence fun x  =>  (exponentialTopKOrderStatisticOracle T lambda k).toConsumptionModel likelihood k) (t : ItemType T), Tendsto (fun N  =>  (allocation N).representation t) atTop (nhds (likelihood t ^ 1 / \sum i, likelihood i ^ 1))

lemmaD4_formula.statement: \forall {T : ℕ} [NeZero T] (likelihood : ItemType T \to ℝ) {k : ℕ} {alpha : ℝ}, 1 < alpha \to 0 < k \to (\forall (t : ItemType T), 0 < likelihood t) \to \forall (seq : OptimalAllocationSequence fun x  =>  paretoIidOrderStatisticConsumptionModel likelihood k alpha) (t : ItemType T), Tendsto (fun N  =>  (allocation N).representation t) atTop (nhds (likelihood t ^ (alpha / (alpha - 1)) / \sum i, likelihood i ^ (alpha / (alpha - 1))))

lemmaD5.statement: \forall {T : ℕ} (likelihood : ItemType T \to ℝ) (N k : ℕ), 0 < N \to \forall (a : CountAllocation T), (uniformTopKConsumptionModel likelihood k).IsOptimalAtTotal N a \to \sum i, √(likelihood i) \ne 0 \to (\forall (t : ItemType T), |↑(count t) - ↑N * proposition2SqrtShare likelihood t| \le ↑(card (ItemType T)) + 1) \to (proposition2SqrtProfile likelihood).Approx a ((↑(card (ItemType T)) + 1) / ↑N)

proposition2.statement: \forall {T : ℕ} [inst : NeZero T] (likelihood : ItemType T \to ℝ) (kseq : ℕ \to ℕ), (\forall (t : ItemType T), 0 < likelihood t) \to (\forall (N : ℕ), 0 < N \to 0 < kseq N) \to (\forall (N : ℕ), 0 < N \to ↑(kseq N) + 1 \le ↑N * uniformSqrtMinShare likelihood - ↑T) \to \forall (seq : OptimalAllocationSequence fun N  =>  uniformTopKConsumptionModel likelihood (kseq N)), ConvergesToProfile (proposition2SqrtProfile likelihood)

proposition4.statement: \forall {Profile : Type u_1} (C : Proposition4ContinuousSphereCertificate Profile) (alpha : Profile), gamma uniformProfile \le gamma alpha

proposition5_identity.statement: \forall (k a : ℕ), orderStatisticTopKSumFromMean uniformAscendingOrderStatisticMean k a = uniformTopKValue k a

theorem1_i_formula.statement: \forall {T : ℕ} [NeZero T] {\Omega : Type u_1} [inst : Fintype \Omega] [inst_1 : DecidableEq \Omega] (itemLaw : PMF \Omega) (value : \Omega \to ℝ) {xTop xSecond : ℝ} (likelihood : ItemType T \to ℝ) (k : ℕ) (seq : OptimalAllocationSequence fun x  =>  theorem1CommonTopKModel (finiteDiscreteIidTopKExpected \Omega itemLaw k value) likelihood k), 0 < k \to 0 < xTop \to 0 \le xSecond \to xSecond \le xTop \to xSecond < xTop \to (\forall (\omega : \Omega), value \omega \le xTop) \to (\forall (\omega : \Omega), value \omega = xTop \lor value \omega \le xSecond) \to (0 < pmfProb itemLaw fun \omega  =>  value \omega = xTop) \to (0 < pmfProb itemLaw fun \omega  =>  \lnotvalue \omega = xTop) \to (\forall (t : ItemType T), 0 < likelihood t) \to \forall (t : ItemType T), Tendsto (fun N  =>  (allocation N).representation t) atTop (nhds (1 / ↑T))

theorem1_ii_formula.statement: \forall {T : ℕ} [NeZero T] {beta c M L : ℝ} {k : ℕ} (baseMeasure : Measure ℝ) [IsProbabilityMeasure baseMeasure], (\forallᵐ (y : ℝ) ∂baseMeasure, L \le y \land y \le M) \to (\forallᵐ (y : ℝ) ∂baseMeasure, 0 \le y) \to 0 < M \to 0 < beta \to 0 < c \to \forall (g : ℝ \to ℝ), (\forallᶠ (x : ℝ) in nhdsWithin 0 (Ioi 0), IntegrableOn g (Ioo 0 x) volume) \to (\forallᶠ (x : ℝ) in nhdsWithin 0 (Ioi 0), real (Ici (M - x)) = \int (u : ℝ) in Ioo 0 x, g u) \to Tendsto (fun u  =>  g u / (c * u ^ (beta - 1))) (nhdsWithin 0 (Ioi 0)) (nhds 1) \to \forall (likelihood : ItemType T \to ℝ), (\forall (t : ItemType T), 0 < likelihood t) \to 0 < k \to 0 < M - L \to \forall (seq : OptimalAllocationSequence fun x  =>  boundedIidOrderStatisticConsumptionModel likelihood k baseMeasure) (t : ItemType T), Tendsto (fun N  =>  (allocation N).representation t) atTop (nhds (likelihood t ^ (beta / (beta + 1)) / \sum i, likelihood i ^ (beta / (beta + 1))))

theorem1_iii_formula.statement: \forall {T : ℕ} [NeZero T] (likelihood : ItemType T \to ℝ) (lambda : ℝ) (k : ℕ), 0 < lambda \to 0 < k \to (\forall (t : ItemType T), 0 < likelihood t) \to \forall (seq : OptimalAllocationSequence fun x  =>  (exponentialTopKOrderStatisticOracle T lambda k).toConsumptionModel likelihood k) (t : ItemType T), Tendsto (fun N  =>  (allocation N).representation t) atTop (nhds (likelihood t ^ 1 / \sum i, likelihood i ^ 1))

theorem1_iv_formula.statement: \forall {T : ℕ} [NeZero T] (likelihood : ItemType T \to ℝ) {k : ℕ} {alpha : ℝ}, 1 < alpha \to 0 < k \to (\forall (t : ItemType T), 0 < likelihood t) \to \forall (seq : OptimalAllocationSequence fun x  =>  paretoIidOrderStatisticConsumptionModel likelihood k alpha) (t : ItemType T), Tendsto (fun N  =>  (allocation N).representation t) atTop (nhds (likelihood t ^ (alpha / (alpha - 1)) / \sum i, likelihood i ^ (alpha / (alpha - 1))))

theorem1_v_common_mean.statement: \forall {T : ℕ} (likelihood : ItemType T \to ℝ) (mean : ℝ) (N : ℕ) (best : ItemType T), 0 \le mean \to (\forall (t : ItemType T), likelihood t \le likelihood best) \to (linearized likelihood fun x  =>  mean).IsOptimalAtTotal N (allOnTypeAllocation N best)

theorem1_v_unique_common_mean.statement: \forall {T : ℕ} (likelihood : ItemType T \to ℝ) (mean : ℝ) (N : ℕ) (best : ItemType T), 0 < mean \to (\forall (t : ItemType T), t \ne best \to likelihood t < likelihood best) \to \forall (a : CountAllocation T), (linearized likelihood fun x  =>  mean).IsOptimalAtTotal N a \to \forall (t : ItemType T), t \ne best \to count t = 0

theorem2_i_formula.statement: \forall {T : ℕ} [NeZero T] (likelihood : ItemType T \to ℝ) (alpha c d : ℝ), 0 \le alpha \to alpha < 1 \to 0 < c \to 0 \le d \to decayingBernoulliSuccess c d alpha 0 < 1 \to (\forall (t : ItemType T), 0 < likelihood t) \to \forall (seq : OptimalAllocationSequence fun x  =>  decayingBernoulliTopOneConsumptionModel likelihood c d alpha) (t : ItemType T), Tendsto (fun N  =>  (allocation N).representation t) atTop (nhds (1 / ↑T))

theorem2_ii_formula.statement: \forall {T : ℕ} [NeZero T] (likelihood : ItemType T \to ℝ) (c d : ℝ), 0 < c \to 0 \le d \to decayingBernoulliSuccess c d 1 0 < 1 \to (\forall (t : ItemType T), 0 < likelihood t) \to \forall (seq : OptimalAllocationSequence fun x  =>  decayingBernoulliTopOneConsumptionModel likelihood c d 1) (t : ItemType T), Tendsto (fun N  =>  (allocation N).representation t) atTop (nhds (likelihood t ^ (1 / (1 + c)) / \sum i, likelihood i ^ (1 / (1 + c))))

theorem2_iii_formula.statement: \forall {T : ℕ} [NeZero T] (likelihood : ItemType T \to ℝ) (alpha c d : ℝ), 1 < alpha \to 0 < c \to 0 \le d \to decayingBernoulliSuccess c d alpha 0 < 1 \to (\forall (t : ItemType T), 0 < likelihood t) \to \forall (seq : OptimalAllocationSequence fun x  =>  decayingBernoulliTopOneConsumptionModel likelihood c d alpha) (t : ItemType T), Tendsto (fun N  =>  (allocation N).representation t) atTop (nhds (likelihood t ^ (1 / alpha) / \sum i, likelihood i ^ (1 / alpha)))

theorem2_iv_alpha_zero_condition.statement: \forall {T : ℕ} (likelihood : ItemType T \to ℝ) (c d : ℝ) (N : ℕ) (best : ItemType T), 0 \le c \to (\forall (t : ItemType T), likelihood t \le likelihood best) \to (decayingBernoulliAllConsumedConsumptionModel likelihood c d 0).IsOptimalAtTotal N (allOnTypeAllocation N best)

theorem2_iv_positive_alpha.statement: \forall {T : ℕ} [NeZero T] (likelihood : ItemType T \to ℝ) (alpha c d : ℝ), 0 < alpha \to 0 < c \to 0 \le d \to (\forall (t : ItemType T), 0 < likelihood t) \to \forall (seq : OptimalAllocationSequence fun x  =>  decayingBernoulliAllConsumedConsumptionModel likelihood c d alpha) (t : ItemType T), Tendsto (fun N  =>  (allocation N).representation t) atTop (nhds (likelihood t ^ (1 / alpha) / \sum i, likelihood i ^ (1 / alpha)))

theorem3_formula.statement: \forall {T : ℕ} [NeZero T] (B : BernoulliSatisfactionModel T), (\forall (t : ItemType T), 0 < successProb t) \to (\forall (t : ItemType T), successProb t < 1) \to (\forall (t : ItemType T), 0 < likelihood t) \to \forall (seq : OptimalAllocationSequence fun x  =>  toConsumptionModel) (t : ItemType T), Tendsto (fun N  =>  (allocation N).representation t) atTop (nhds (theorem3LogShareWeight B t / \sum i, theorem3LogShareWeight B i))
